title: Naddist
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Religion |image=[[File:Naddist_banner1.jpg]] |name=Naddist |leader=[[King/Legends|King]] of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] |governing= |positions= |organizations= |sects= |headquarters= |language= |affiliated= |texts= |deities=[[Freedon Nadd]] |locations= |artifacts= |ceremonies= |holidays= |founding= |origin=[[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] |founder= |collapse= |restore= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Hear me people of Iziz! ''Freedon Nadd'' gave this city strength against the wild men and their beasts—as long as ''King Ommin'' and ''Queen Amanoa'' carried on that noble rule…the great power of Freedon Nadd remained with us!''"
"''Now that power has been ''taken'' from us by the hateful Jedi Knights. These meddlers have destroyed the ancient Onderon society!|Naddist propaganda spread by [[Rask]] and [[Nebo]]|[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]]}} The '''Naddists''' were a [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] that worshiped the fallen [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Freedon Nadd]]. They built the [[Proving Grounds|Ancient Proving Grounds]] for trials where competitors would fight to the death to curry favor with the Dark Lord.{{TORcite|exp=ons|type=codex|Ancient Proving Grounds}} Many of them were capable of using ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith sorcery/Legends|magic]]. Two such individuals were King [[Ommin/Legends|Ommin]] and his wife Queen [[Amanoa]]. They were largely eliminated following the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]]. {{Deity-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi'' audio drama]] *[[Tales of the Jedi 1|''Tales of the Jedi'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] *[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 3]] {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Codex}} *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Onslaught]]'' {{Codex}} *[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|27|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 2}} *{{InsiderCite|28|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 3}} *''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' *{{FactFile|113|REV 1-2|Naddist Revolt}} *{{FactFile|115|REV 3-4|Naddist Revolt}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Naddist |es=Naddista |fr=Naddistes |pl=Naddyści |pt=Legends:Naddista |tr=Naddist }} [[Category:Naddist]] [[Category:Organizations of Onderon]] [[Category:Religious organizations]] [[Category:Secret societies]]
